attacking_style: Opportunistic break specialist who can adapt tactics mid-race when reading disorganized chases. Capable of winning from small breaks (3 riders) after late selection on categorized climbs with 10km remaining.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team patterns. Appears capable of independent tactical decision-making when opportunities arise.
terrain_preference: Selective finish courses where late climbs (e.g., categorized côtes) eliminate pure sprinters but don't require pure climbing ability. Benefits from chaos that creates small, manageable breakaways.
vulnerability: Natural wait-and-sprint style suggests potential weakness in sustained climbing or when forced to lead out efforts. May struggle when favorites execute organized, controlled pursuits.
key_patterns: Adaptable racer who deviates from preferred sprint style when conditions favor breakaway tactics
Strong early-season form with unusually high win count by March
Effective in small break scenarios (3 riders) rather than large group sprints
form_trajectory: positive: unusually high win total for early 2018, demonstrating strong early-season condition and tactical confidence to deviate from typical approach
